creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Phillipe - Please file an official upstream bug report with the Fluxbox project with the requested information as noted in the upstream response that follows.

Upstream response:

A bug report with the attached stack trace on sf.net/projects/fluxbox/
would be better. 

Skimming the existing bug list:
http://sourceforge.net/p/fluxbox/bugs/1126/ looks like the same issue.

Can you provide more information about the fluxbox configuration and
which tools are configured etc?
